title: TACZ Advanced DeathInfo (Kill Banners)
description: Add an FPS like kill banner for TACZ
body:
# **TACZ Advanced DeathInfo**


![Main Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a4f31c451b3c20d7c9c7c102b9d850983fa5953_0.webp)

**The mod added a new HUD to show players killing info**

![Kills with frames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b59c7c5bac2e82443cd28686fc06f0f81093fd3_0.webp)
**Now message frames available!**


## Appearance:
Just like a classic fps kill info banner. You can choose it appear on which corner just in config.

It set to display max to 7 message banner by default, old messages will fade out or just disappear (when it's full).

The default colors are Yellow (self), Green (teammates), Red (enemies or individuals), Grey (mobs and entities). The teams and teammates are controlled by vanilla "/team" feature.

![This image shows a teammate kill](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13dd336d19fee7a9ff0510b1822cf5aa3032a52a_0.webp)

_This image shows a teammate kill_
